title: Ham and Eggs at the Front
writer: Darryl F. Zanuck, Jimmy Starr, Robert Dillon
actors: Tom Wilson, Heinie Conklin, Myrna Loy
plot: Fifi, (Mryna Loy), a dusky, sultry Senegalese spy, uses her wiles to get information out of two American army soldiers, Ham, (Tom Wilson), and Eggs, (Heinie Conklin), in France during World War One.
